title: Formation Flight near-wing boundary population source census

qualificationAmendment.reason: The preregistered c8 instrumentation-only smoke proved exact history replay and 1.24e-7 population reconstruction, but exposed a host report filter that copied the intentionally uncaptured phase-0 slot as two zero-support samples.
qualificationAmendment.scope: Move the phase-0 exclusion from the mechanism-report copier to the boundary-source-report copier; no Metal arithmetic, solver state, selected phase, decomposition, threshold, or decision rule changed.

scientificQuestion: Is the c16-to-c20 near-wing source discrepancy caused primarily by changes in which D3Q19 links sample the boundary, or by changes in the conditional population reconstruction on those links?

primary.selectionSource: locked early-cycle near-boundary residual maximum and source-amplitude streamwise classification

recordedQuantitiesPerOwnerDirection: absolute and squared incoming population sums
near, far, and halfway-fallback branch counts

decomposition.arealDirectionalLinkMeasure: a_r(q) = linkCount_r(q) / chordCells_r^2; this preserves grid-normalized boundary-link density as well as direction distribution
decomposition.primaryMomentumExchangePopulation: rawReflectedPopulationSum + reconstructedIncomingPopulationSum, matching the two populations in the production momentum-exchange force
decomposition.conditionalMean: m_r(q) = primaryMomentumExchangePopulation_r(q) / linkCount_r(q), with zero only for a zero-support direction
decomposition.attributionNorm: sum over D3Q19 directions of abs(term(q))*length(c_q), matching directional momentum magnitude
decomposition.wingFrameMomentum: sum_q s(q)*c_q projected on the analytic wing chord, span, and normal axes

decisionRule.primarySignal: areal momentum-exchange population profile at the primary probe
decisionRule.directionalLinkSamplingDominated: link-sampling L1 share is at least 0.6
decisionRule.conditionalPopulationAmplitudeDominated: conditional-amplitude L1 share is at least 0.6
decisionRule.reflectedPopulationAmplitudeDominated: conditional amplitude is dominant and the reflected amplitude-subterm L1 share is at least 0.6
decisionRule.interpolationAuxiliaryAmplitudeDominated: conditional amplitude is dominant and the interpolation amplitude-subterm L1 share is at least 0.6
decisionRule.movingWallAmplitudeDominated: conditional amplitude is dominant and the moving-wall amplitude-subterm L1 share is at least 0.6
decisionRule.mixedPerLinkPopulationAmplitude: conditional amplitude is dominant but no amplitude subterm reaches 0.6
decisionRule.nextIfDirectionalLinkSamplingDominated: test localized near-wing geometric refinement or improved link-quadrature realization before changing population reconstruction
decisionRule.nextIfReflectedPopulationAmplitudeDomina: trace pre-boundary collision and streamed reflected populations on the dominant directions
decisionRule.nextIfInterpolationAuxiliaryAmplitudeDom: test the near/far interpolation branches on a fixed realized link set
decisionRule.nextIfMovingWallAmplitudeDominated: test wall-velocity and density correction on a fixed realized link set
decisionRule.nextIfMixedPerLinkPopulationAmplitude: capture cell-resolved covariance among reflected, interpolation, and wall terms only on dominant directions
decisionRule.nextIfMixedLinkSamplingAndPopulationAmpl: run one localized c18 bridge at the primary phase before selecting a mechanism

claimBoundary: This source census can select the numerical mechanism behind the stopped c16-to-c20 formation ladder. It cannot authorize a quantitative formation-power benefit, production solver change, or biological bird claim.
